name: SourceBrief EvoEmbedding temporal-memory 50Q eval
description: Structured temporal/memory eval for deciding whether EvoEmbedding-style retrieval is worth adopting in SourceBrief Retrieval V2. Placeholder IDs must be replaced with real imported resources before execution.

corpus_caveats: operator-curated notes from the EvoEmbedding adoption thread; replace with the real imported thread resource before running
